goal: Построить custom features, обучить CatBoost long/short модели, прогнать OOS backtests и доказать additive value над базой active-signal-v1.
global_constraints: baseline active-signal-v1@1 is immutable and must never be modified
all features must be causally clean — no future leakage at any stage
train / selection OOS / lockbox split must be frozen before any model training begins
purge gap of 24h between consecutive windows is mandatory
long and short models must be trained independently
thresholds must be selected and frozen before lockbox is opened
every model sleeve must receive a terminal decision: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST, or REJECT
no black-box acceptance — feature importance and SHAP must be recorded for every trained model

slices.title: Dataset contract и chronological split без утечек
slices.hypothesis: Зафиксировать train / selection OOS / lockbox windows с purge gap до начала любого model training.
slices.objective: Зафиксировать train / selection OOS / lockbox windows с purge gap до начала любого model training.
success_criteria: все modeling windows frozen до начала training
evidence_requirements: все modeling windows frozen до начала training

slices.title: Быстрая plausibility-проверка feature packs на train/selection discipline
slices.hypothesis: Отсеять feature packs до full training: обучить минимальные prototypes и оценить signal quality на selection OOS.
slices.objective: Отсеять feature packs до full training: обучить минимальные prototypes и оценить signal quality на selection OOS.
success_criteria: есть shortlist модельных setups для full training
каждый promoted setup имеет selection_signal_quality_ok = true
evidence_requirements: есть shortlist модельных setups для full training
каждый promoted setup имеет selection_signal_quality_ok = true

slices.title: Обучение CatBoost-long и CatBoost-short
slices.hypothesis: Обучить по 1–2 disciplined candidate models на каждую сторону с frozen params, SHAP и feature importance.
slices.objective: Обучить по 1–2 disciplined candidate models на каждую сторону с frozen params, SHAP и feature importance.
success_criteria: есть frozen model candidates для long и short
params_frozen = true, selection_oos_ok = true для каждого candidate
evidence_requirements: есть frozen model candidates для long и short
params_frozen = true, selection_oos_ok = true для каждого candidate
